Summary

Some adapters and view for things progressing towards completion.

classes.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IProgressAdapter

methods.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IProgressAdapter.cost
documentation: the total cost

methods.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IProgressAdapter.done
documentation: what is already done

methods.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IProgressAdapter.todo
documentation: what remains to be done

methods.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IProgressAdapter.progress_info
documentation:
returns a dictionary describing progress/estimated cost of the
version.

- mandatory keys are (''estimated', 'done', 'todo')

- optional keys are ('notestimated', 'notestimatedcorrected',
  'estimatedcorrected')

'noestimated' and 'notestimatedcorrected' should default to 0
'estimatedcorrected' should default to 'estimated'

methods.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IProgressAdapter.finished
documentation: returns True if status is finished

methods.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IProgressAdapter.in_progress
documentation: returns True if status is not finished

methods.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IProgressAdapter.progress
documentation: returns the % progress of the task item

something that has a cost, a state and a progression.

You should at least override progress_info an in_progress methods on
concrete implementations.

methods.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IMileStoneAdapter.get_main_task
documentation: returns the main ITask entity

methods.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IMileStoneAdapter.initial_prevision_date
documentation: returns the initial expected end of the milestone

methods.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IMileStoneAdapter.eta_date
documentation:
returns expected date of completion based on what remains
to be done

methods.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IMileStoneAdapter.completion_date
documentation: returns date on which the subtask has been completed

methods.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IMileStoneAdapter.contractors
documentation: returns the list of persons supposed to work on this task

class_variables.name: cubicweb_iprogress.entities.IMileStoneAdapter.parent_type
documentation: specify main task's type

classes.name: cubicweb_iprogress.views.ProgressTableView
documentation:
The progress table view is able to display progress information
of any object implement IMileStone.

By default it is composed of 7 columns : parent task, milestone, state,
estimated date, cost, progressbar, and todo_by

As {class}`EntityTableView` a `columns` class attribute lets you remove or
reorder some of those columns.

classes.name: cubicweb_iprogress.views.InContextProgressTableView
documentation:
this views redirects to `progress_table_view` but removes
the `project` column

classes.name: cubicweb_iprogress.views.ProgressBarView
documentation: displays a progress bar
